mnemonics: E.O.D. (Executives, Operators, Developers) - Match data to the End Of the Decision chain for each user class.
keyPoints: Executives need summarized, strategic data for high-level decision making.
Operators need detailed, real-time data for day-to-day tasks and operational decisions.
Developers and analysts need detailed, historical data to build reports and analyze trends.
commonMistakes: Providing overly detailed data to executives, causing analysis paralysis.
Giving only summarized data to operators, which lacks the detail needed for their tasks.
Assuming all users have the same data needs and access patterns.
